summary: If the target is unsuccessful, he remains pinned

mechanics.excerpt: If the target is unsuccessful, he remains pinned Eye Gouge (Attack): +5 TN, but if it inflicts any Fatigue_ your opponent has Target Number to all attacks for the next 106 turns Note this maneuver cannot be used against target whose eyes are covered by goggles Or full helmet: Haymaker (Attack): By taking Fatigue you may add 206 damage, BLADES The Blades Skill covers the use of all one-handed melee weapons that are not jointed or flexible (in which case the Whips Skill iS used_ 108).
